name: 2pk Industrial Wood & Steel Adjustable Counter Stools - Aged Oak/Black - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Bring a dash of industrial flair to your kitchen island, countertop or home bar with these Industrial Wood & Steel Adjustable Counter Stools from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. The armless counter stool set is set on four black sleek metal legs and back with aged oak wooden seat and headrest for added interest — allowing you and your guests to fully relax while enjoying drinks. Plus, this multi-functional stool set features an adjustable height and single-ring footrest to offer a comfortable seating experience.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy

Overall Width: 15.75 inches
Overall Depth: 17 inches
Seat Depth: 14.375 inches
Min Seat Height: 18.625 inches
Max Seat Height: 24.125 inches
Min Back Height: 28.375 inches
Max Back Height: 34.125 inches
